reason: Backend conventions: file header, async, schema patterns, no-repo-pattern; required for writing new bulk endpoints correctly
HTTPException/404 patterns for category validation and bulk endpoints
ORM query patterns, transaction boundaries for SELECT+UPDATE/DELETE on user_id-scoped IN() batches
Frontend stack conventions (React 19, Tailwind v3, shadcn/ui) for new checkbox/alert-dialog components
shadcn component patterns, styling, composition conventions for new ui components
React Query mutation + queryKey invalidation conventions for useBulkMoveFeeds/useBulkDeleteFeeds
Local useState vs Zustand boundary — selectedIds/selectMode are UI state, confirms not in store
Type/interface conventions for new BulkMoveResult/BulkDeleteResult types
Backend+frontend cross-layer change (API contract field-name snake_case alignment, action ordering)
